steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ and switch chain to Ethereum
steps.observed: App loaded, chain set to Ethereum (1)

steps.action: Clear From Token field and type unrecognized address 0x39AA39c021dfbaE8faC545936693aC917d5E7563
steps.observed: Dialog 'Unrecognized Token' appeared with address and metadata

steps.action: Cancel popup, reset From Token to USDC, clear To Token and type same unrecognized address
steps.expected: Warning popup appears for To field too
steps.observed: Dialog 'Unrecognized Token' appeared for the To field as well

steps.action: Enter unrecognized address 0x39AA39c021dfbaE8faC545936693aC917d5E7563 in From Token field
steps.expected: Popup shows loading then ERC-20 metadata
steps.observed: Popup displayed metadata: Name='Compound USD Coin', Symbol='cUSDC', Decimals=8

steps.action: Verify metadata fields are visible in popup
steps.observed: All three fields shown with correct values from on-chain lookup

steps.action: With unrecognized token popup open, click Cancel button
steps.expected: Popup closes, token not saved to local list
steps.observed: Popup closed, address remained in input field

evidence.network: No additional network calls on Cancel

assertions.title: Save adds token to local list with correct chain

steps.action: Trigger unrecognized token popup again for 0x39AA39c021dfbaE8faC545936693aC917d5E7563

steps.expected: Popup closes, input shows formatted SYMBOL (0xAddress)
steps.observed: Popup closed, To Token field updated to 'cUSDC (0x39AA39c021dfbaE8faC545936693aC917d5E7563)'
localStorage contains JSON with tokens array including {chainId:1, address:'0x39AA39c021dfbaE8faC545936693aC917d5E7563', name:'Compound USD Coin', symbol:'cUSDC', decimals:8}

steps.action: Enter EOA/precompile address 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001 in From Token field
steps.expected: Popup shows error for non-ERC-20 token
steps.observed: Popup displayed red error box: 'Not a valid ERC-20 token'

steps.expected: Save to Local List button disabled
steps.observed: Save button rendered as disabled (grayed out), only Cancel is actionable

evidence.consoleErrors: Two 'Failed to load resource' errors for /token-metadata with the precompile address (expected - server correctly rejects non-ERC-20)

assertions.title: Metadata fetch failure shows error in popup

steps.action: Set up Playwright route interception to return 500 for /token-metadata requests
Enter unrecognized address 0x5d3a536E4D6DbD6114cc1Ead35777bAB948E3643 (cDAI) in From Token
steps.expected: Popup appears with error message due to failed fetch
steps.observed: Popup displayed red error box: 'Internal Server Error'

steps.expected: Save button disabled when metadata fetch fails
steps.observed: Save to Local List button rendered as disabled (grayed out)

evidence.consoleErrors: Multiple 'Failed to load resource: net::ERR_FAILED' and 500 errors for /token-metadata (expected due to route interception)

frictions.description: Playwright MCP page.evaluate() and browser_run_code sometimes lose page context (navigates to about:blank). Required navigating back to the app URL multiple times.
frictions.resolution: Navigated back to http://localhost:3002/ after each context loss. Used browser_select_option and browser_click MCP tools instead of run_code when possible.

frictions.description: Clicking from one token field to another while an unrecognized address is still in the first field re-triggers the popup for the first field's address on blur.
frictions.resolution: Worked around by selecting a known token (USDC) in the From field before testing the To field independently.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. VAL-TOKEN-001 confirmed popup triggers for both from/to fields. VAL-TOKEN-002 confirmed on-chain metadata (name, symbol, decimals) fetched and displayed. VAL-TOKEN-003 confirmed Cancel dismisses without saving. VAL-TOKEN-004 confirmed Save persists token to localStorage with correct chainId and formats the input. VAL-TOKEN-006 confirmed non-ERC-20 address shows error with disabled Save. VAL-TOKEN-008 confirmed metadata fetch failure (via route interception) shows error with disabled Save.
